---
title: "Tankerville Chamberlayne"
---

## Tankerville Chamberlayne

**Dates:** (1843-1924)

### Description

M.P. for Southampton, son of [[person:282]Thomas Chamberlayne] of Cranbury Park

### Biography

He was first elected in 1892.  He was found to have given a constituent money for a railway fare to vote, and his election in 1895 was therefore declared invalid.  He was defeated in the consequent by-election, and subsequently re-elected in 1900, serving until 1906.

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 5 th 1900
- [To Beatrice Henrietta Heathcote, Feb 11 [1898]](../letters/3371_To_Beatrice_Henrietta_Heathcote.html)
- Letter from Midsummer Day [21 June 1897]
- Letter from July 10th 1892

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
